title: The Aftermath on Little Garden
description: On pages 0–8, the aftermath on little garden as the battle on Little Garden closes with the giants’ pride restored and the Straw Hats preparing to leave the ancient island.
scene: The Aftermath on Little Garden. The battle on Little Garden closes with the giants’ pride restored and the Straw Hats preparing to leave the ancient island. The focus is the story beat, character decisions, and dialogue driving this part.
